user.title: Connect to HeatCon
user.description: Configure the local HeatCon controller connection.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the HeatCon controller.

set_schedule.name: Set schedule
set_schedule.description: Write the weekly heating schedule (switching times) for a zone.

switchingtimes.name: Switching times
switchingtimes.description: Flat list of 21 slots (7 days x 3 slots per day) matching the climate entity's 'schedule' attribute. Each slot is either null (no heating period) or an object with 'from' and 'to' hours and an optional 'type' (defaults to 'H').
